steps: Keep the session playing for 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The session keeps playing for 10 minutes and the app does not crash or freeze.

steps: Keep the session playing for 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The session keeps playing for 10 minutes and the app does not crash or freeze.

tests.scenario: Open app and start session within 5 seconds
steps: Wait for the home screen to become usable
Tap a session and press play
tests.expected_result: The home screen is usable and the user can start a session within 5 seconds.

tests.scenario: Cold start is not slow (within 5 seconds)
steps: Restart the phone (or clear app from recent apps)
Launch the app on a typical Wi-Fi or cellular network
Attempt to open a session from the home screen
tests.expected_result: From opening the app, the user can reach a playable session within 5 seconds (no major lag).

tests.scenario: Locked content is labeled in browse list
steps: Find an item that requires subscription
tests.expected_result: The item shows a clear label like “subscription required” before the user selects it.

tests.scenario: Locked content is labeled on details screen
steps: Open the details page for a paid/locked item
tests.expected_result: The details screen clearly shows it needs a subscription before the user tries to play it.

tests.scenario: Before paying, price + renewal details are shown
steps: Navigate to the final confirmation screen
tests.expected_result: Price, billing period (monthly/yearly), and renewal date are shown on the same screen before confirming.

steps: Use an account with an active subscription
Open subscription management inside the app (if available)
tests.expected_result: Price/billing period and next renewal date are shown clearly before any renewal confirmation.

steps: Log in with an account that has an active subscription
tests.expected_result: The settings area shows clear cancellation instructions.

tests.scenario: Settings has a link to Google Play subscription management
steps: Log in with an account that has an active subscription
Select the option to manage/cancel subscription
tests.expected_result: Tapping the link opens Google Play’s subscription management page for Headspace.
The downloaded session still appears in the Downloads list after reopening the app.
Both downloaded sessions still appear in the Downloads list after reopening the app.
The downloaded session plays from start to finish and no offline error is shown.
The session plays successfully without any network connectivity.

tests.scenario: Login works with valid credentials (no loop)
tests.expected_result: The user gets signed in and is not bounced back to the login screen.
After reopening the app, the user is still signed in (no forced relogin).

tests.scenario: Paid content works for active subscriber
steps: Log in with an active subscription account
tests.expected_result: The session opens and plays, and there is no wrong subscription error.

tests.scenario: No blocking “already have a subscription” error
steps: Log in with an active subscription account
tests.expected_result: The app does not show a blocking message like “already have a subscription”, and access is allowed.

tests.scenario: “Continue” shows up after starting a course
tests.expected_result: A “Continue” option shows up on the home screen (or another obvious place).

steps: Start a course and complete one step/session
tests.expected_result: The app resumes the correct next step/session in the same course.

steps: Try to locate the Care button
tests.expected_result: The Care button is visible and can be opened within 2 taps.
Support chat is visible and can be opened within 2 taps.

tests.scenario: Turn off haptics and confirm no vibration
steps: Tap multiple buttons in different screens
tests.expected_result: No haptic feedback happens when buttons are tapped.
Haptic feedback happens when the user taps buttons (so the setting works).
